2604.08476.title: Faithful GRPO: Improving Visual Spatial Reasoning in Multimodal Language Models via Constrained Policy Optimization
2604.08476.paper_summary: Multimodal reasoning models (MRMs) trained with reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) show improved accuracy on visual reasoning benchmarks. However, we observe that accuracy gains often come at the cost of reasoning quality: generated Chain-of-Thought (CoT) traces are frequently inconsistent with the final answer and poorly grounded in the visual evidence. We systematically study this phenomenon across seven challenging real-world spatial reasoning benchmarks and find that it affects contemporary MRMs such as ViGoRL-Spatial, TreeVGR as well as our own models trained with standard Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). We characterize CoT reasoning quality along two complementary axes: "logical consistency" (does the CoT entail the final answer?) and "visual grounding" (does each reasoning step accurately describe objects, attributes, and spatial relationships in the image?). To address this, we propose Faithful GRPO (FGRPO), a variant of GRPO that enforces consistency and grounding as constraints via Lagrangian dual ascent. FGRPO incorporates batch-level consistency and grounding constraints into the advantage computation within a group, adaptively adjusting the relative importance of constraints during optimization. We evaluate FGRPO on Qwen2.5-VL-7B and 3B backbones across seven spatial datasets. Our results show that FGRPO substantially improves reasoning quality, reducing the inconsistency rate from 24.5% to 1.7% and improving visual grounding scores by +13%. It also improves final answer accuracy over simple GRPO, demonstrating that faithful reasoning enables better answers.
2604.08476.paper_summary_zh: 多模態推理模型 (MRMs) 透過可驗證獎勵的強化學習 (RLVR) 訓練，顯示在視覺推理基準測試中的準確性有所提升。<lb/>然而，我們觀察到準確性提升往往以推理質量為代價：生成的思維鏈 (CoT) 跡線經常與最終答案不一致，並且在視覺證據上缺乏良好的基礎。<lb/>我們系統性地研究這一現象，涵蓋七個具有挑戰性的現實世界空間推理基準，發現它影響當前的 MRMs，如 ViGoRL-Spatial、TreeVGR 以及我們自己使用標準群體相對政策優化 (GRPO) 訓練的模型。<lb/>我們沿著兩個互補的軸線來描述 CoT 推理質量：“邏輯一致性”（CoT 是否推導出最終答案？）和“視覺基礎”（每個推理步驟是否準確描述了圖像中的物體、屬性和空間關係？）。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了忠實 GRPO (FGRPO)，這是一種 GRPO 的變體，通過拉格朗日對偶上升來強制一致性和基礎作為約束。<lb/>FGRPO 將批次級別的一致性和基礎約束納入群體內的優勢計算中，並在優化過程中自適應地調整約束的相對重要性。<lb/>我們在 Qwen2.5-VL-7B 和 3B 主幹上，針對七個空間數據集評估 FGRPO。<lb/>我們的結果顯示，FGRPO 顯著改善了推理質量，將不一致率從 24.5% 降低到 1.7%，並將視覺基礎分數提高了 13%。<lb/>它還改善了最終答案的準確性，相較於簡單的 GRPO，證明忠實推理能夠提供更好的答案。
2604.08476.author: Sai Srinivas Kancheti et.al.
2604.08476.authors: Sai Srinivas Kancheti, Aditya Kanade, Rohit Sinha, Vineeth N Balasubramanian, Tanuja Ganu
